title: Senior AI Engineer
degreeRequirement: Master's or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Machine Learning, or related field
hiringReason: Building production LLM-based agent pipelines and optimization layers.
businessProblem: High cost and latency in running generative LLM pipeline workflows.
outcomes: Reduce LLM token usage and pricing costs by 25% via prompt optimization and caching.
Implement evaluations and grading loops for LLM accuracy.

responsibilities.text: Design agentic orchestration workflows and prompt validation chains.
Fine-tune and optimize prompt context formatting and caching rules.
